orderId.description: The unique identifier of the order that was refunded.

userId.description: The unique identifier of the user who placed the order.

orderStatus.description: The status set to 'refunded' for this event.

totalAmount.description: The total amount of the original order.

refundAmount.description: The amount refunded to the customer.

refundedAt.description: The date and time when the refund was processed (ISO 8601).
